missions.name: L1 Uplink Backbone Reterm
missions.description: The main trunk on the Earth-Sun L1 relay is reading intermittent. Bring the crimp tool, EVA out, reterminate the backbone. Keep the old cable — the agency pays extra for failure analysis.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: L2 Observatory Mirror Phasing
missions.description: The L2 observatory's primary mirror segments drifted out of phase after a micrometeorite strike. EVA out, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment in by hand.
